creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
2024 Recap

January: The year started slow. I was weak and was still on chemo. When my counts increased, we went on a picnic date and had daily strolls around our building to gain back the muscles I lost. 

February: We spent Valentine’s Day in the hospital. My leukemia relapsed and I had to receive new medications. 🥲

March: I was in the hospital the whole month; tried to cheer myself up by waking around the ward every other day. 

April: I went for another bone marrow biopsy, and thankfully I’m back on remission. 🙏🏻 

May: I was down and depressed for several months, so my family decided to come for a visit. It was the best time of the year! 🥰

June: We went to Abu Dhabi to prepare for my Bone Marrow Transplant. My cousin donated his stem cells and it’s preserved until I’m ready for the procedure.

July: Things started to go back to normal. We were finally able to go on a staycation. I also participated in some indoor summer activities.

August: We ticked off an item on our Dubai Bucket List; we went up to Zeta 77 lounge! Ed and I had a couple of dates to celebrate my health milestone.

September: I started receiving a new set of infusion for my liver, but I was able to revisit my fave offbeat spots in Dubai. 

October: It’s my birth and our anniversary month! We spent my birthday in Hatta. Then, we went on a quick getaway to Voco Monaco during our anniversary. I also spent a fun day out with the girls.

November. We were invited to the inaugural sailing of Resorts World One in the UAE, and it was epic! 🛳️ I had less treatment on schedule, so I was able to spend more time with my friends while waiting for my BMT.

December: It’s quite a slow Christmas month. I’m on isolation, but we’re still blessed to be spending the holidays together. 🎄

❤️ Thank you 2024 for making me more resilient, more hopeful, more faithful. 

❤️ Thank YOU for being with me through the ups and downs of the year. 

❤️ And THANK YOU GOD for your goodness and for making us believe that the best is yet to come! ✨

#2024recap• Dubai • Leukemia Warrior • Places in Dubai • Things to Do in Dubai • Lady and her Sweet Escapes • #Leukemia #LeukemiaWarrior

transcription.text: And with that, the 2024 season comes to an end.
